sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56801" key="keraunoplh/c" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κεραυνο-πλήξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆγος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n56801.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thundersmitten</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0400.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alc.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
